_comment: EXAMPLE store — copy to tickets/index_data.json in YOUR repo, then let /build-ticket-index + /deliver-ticket fill it from real tickets. The real index_data.json is gitignored in THIS kit so a private store can never be committed upstream. Use only fixture ids (ENG-/DEMO-/TEST-/SAMPLE-) in anything committed to the kit.

tickets.title: Backfill loan tape monthly snapshot
tickets.summary: Built MONTHLY snapshot table + view; reconciled 1.2M rows to source within tolerance.

tickets.title: Loan tape follow-up — add delinquency buckets
